caption: A man wearing a black long-sleeved shirt and black over-ear headphones is recorded in a studio setting with dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam walls. He is positioned behind a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Initially, he raises both hands above his head, forming a triangle shape with his fingers while smiling. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hands, briefly holding them out to the sides with palms facing inward, before bringing them back up to touch the top of his headphones. Throughout the clip, the man maintains a cheerful expression, smiling and looking slightly off-camera. The camera remains static in a medium close-up shot, focusing on his upper body and the recording equipment. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
